  "text": "The Node.js ESM loader and CJS-ESM interop bridge consists of multiple interconnected JavaScript and C++ components spanning version 22.13.0.\n\n**JavaScript ESM Infrastructure Files:**\n\n1. **Core Loader (lib/internal/modules/esm/loader.js)** - Contains the ModuleLoader class that manages the overall ESM loading lifecycle, including CustomizedModuleLoader for extensible loading hooks and the createModuleLoader factory function. Also exports getOrInitializeCascadedLoader and the register function for loader registration.\n\n2. **CJS-ESM Interop Bridge (lib/internal/modules/cjs/loader.js)** - Contains the critical finalizeEsmResolution function that bridges CommonJS module resolution with ESM, enabling CJS modules to seamlessly interoperate with ESM modules by resolving ESM specifiers.\n\n3. **Module Job Pipeline (lib/internal/modules/esm/module_job.js)** - Implements ModuleJobBase, ModuleJob, and ModuleJobSync classes that manage the linking and evaluation pipeline for modules. Contains the _link() method for dependency resolution and evaluate methods for execution.\n\n4. **Format Translators (lib/internal/modules/esm/translators.js)** - Defines translators for different module formats: moduleStrategy for ESM, commonjsStrategy/commonjs-sync for CJS, builtinStrategy for built-in modules, jsonStrategy for JSON, and wasm translator for WASM modules.   "text": "The Node.js ESM loader and CJS-ESM interop bridge consists of multiple interconnected JavaScript and C++ components spanning version 22.13.0.\n\n**JavaScript ESM Infrastructure Files:**\n\n1. **Core Loader (lib/internal/modules/esm/loader.js)** - Contains the ModuleLoader class that manages the overall ESM loading lifecycle, including CustomizedModuleLoader for extensible loading hooks and the createModuleLoader factory function. Contains the _link() method for dependency resolution and evaluate methods for execution.\n\n4. **Format Translators (lib/internal/modules/esm/translators.js)** - Defines translators for different module formats: moduleStrategy for ESM, commonjsStrategy/commonjs-sync for CJS, builtinStrategy for built-in modules, jsonStrategy for JSON, and wasm translator for WASM modules. Each translator normalizes module loading for different formats.\n\n5. **Specifier Resolution (lib/internal/modules/esm/resolve.js)** - Implements defaultResolve as the primary resolution function, moduleResolve for general module resolution, packageExportsResolve for package.json exports, packageImportsResolve for imports field, packageResolve for package resolution, and resolveAsCommonJS for CJS fallback resolution. Includes decorateErrorWithCommonJSHints for helpful error messages during CJS-ESM transitions.\n\n6. **Module Loading (lib/internal/modules/esm/load.js)** - Provides defaultLoad and defaultLoadSync functions that fetch and prepare module source code, with getSource handling async source retrieval.\n\n7. **Entry Point Detection (lib/internal/modules/run_main.js)** - Implements resolveMainPath that detects whether the entry point should be treated as ESM or CJS based on configuration and package.json settings.\n\n8. **Supporting Infrastructure:**\n   - module_map.js: ResolveCache and LoadCache for module caching\n   - get_format.js: defaultGetFormat and defaultGetFormatWithoutErrors for format detection\n   - hooks.js: Hooks and HooksProxy classes for customizable loader hooks\n   - utils.js: Common ESM utilities and helpers\n   - fetch_module.js: Network module fetching\n   - initialize_import_meta.js: import.meta object initialization\n   - assert.js: Import assertion validation\n   - create_dynamic_module.js: Dynamic module creation helpers\n   - formats.js: Format constants\n   - shared_constants.js: Shared constants\n   - helpers.js: General module helpers\n\n**Native C++ Module Binding:**\n\n1. **ModuleWrap Binding (src/module_wrap.h and src/module_wrap.cc)** - The native C++ binding to V8's module system. Key methods include:\n   - Constructor and CompileSourceTextModule for compilation\n   - Link and Instantiate for module linking\n   - Evaluate and EvaluateSync for code execution\n   - GetNamespace and GetNamespaceSync for namespace access\n   - GetModuleRequests for dependency extraction\n   - ResolveModuleCallback, SetImportModuleDynamicallyCallback, and HostInitializeImportMetaObjectCallback for V8 integration\n\n**Module Loading Execution Chain:**\n\nWhen a Node.js process starts with an ESM entry point:\n1. run_main.js::resolveMainPath detects the entry point type\n2. loader.js::getOrInitializeCascadedLoader initializes the module loader\n3.
